summary: Iteration 34 - ClientePreviewSidebar Testing Complete. All 11 test cases PASSED. The dedicated sidebar for 'Vista Cliente' admin preview mode is fully functional with PRE ANALISI and POST ANALISI sections, forcedStep wizard control, and proper ViewSwitcher hiding.
critical_code_review_comments: SIDEBAR ARCHITECTURE VERIFIED: ClientePreviewSidebar replaces AdminSidebarLight when nav.startsWith('cp-')
PRE ANALISI SECTION VERIFIED: Contains Benvenuto, Questionario, Richiesta Analisi, Conferma Acquisto
POST ANALISI SECTION VERIFIED: Contains Analisi e Partnership
FORCED STEP CONTROL VERIFIED: Sidebar items correctly map to wizard steps (cp-benvenuto→1, cp-questionario→2, cp-richiesta→3, cp-conferma→5)
TORNA AD ADMIN BUTTON VERIFIED: Always visible at bottom of sidebar, returns to 'clienti' page with admin sidebar
VIEWSWITCHER HIDING VERIFIED: ViewSwitcher is hidden when nav.startsWith('cp-') via condition in App.js line 1556
TOPBAR TITLE VERIFIED: Shows 'Vista Cliente' when in cliente preview mode
DATA-TESTID ATTRIBUTES VERIFIED: All sidebar items have proper data-testid for testing (sidebar-cp-benvenuto, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ClientePreviewSidebar is fully implemented and working. When admin clicks 'Vista Cliente' in ViewSwitcher, the sidebar changes to the dedicated ClientePreviewSidebar with PRE ANALISI (Benvenuto, Questionario, Richiesta Analisi, Conferma Acquisto) and POST ANALISI (Analisi e Partnership) sections. Each sidebar item controls the wizard step via forcedStep prop. The 'Torna ad Admin' button returns to admin dashboard with classic sidebar.

test_1_admin_login_sidebar.details: Admin login loads dashboard with classic sidebar (OPERATIVO section visible)

test_2_vista_cliente_sidebar_change.details: Clicking 'Vista Cliente' in ViewSwitcher changes sidebar to ClientePreviewSidebar with PRE ANALISI and POST ANALISI sections

test_3_sidebar_items_verification.details: All sidebar items found with data-testid: sidebar-cp-benvenuto, sidebar-cp-questionario, sidebar-cp-richiesta, sidebar-cp-conferma, sidebar-cp-analisi, back-to-admin

test_4_benvenuto_step1.details: Clicking 'Benvenuto' shows Step 1 wizard with 'Benvenuto in Evolution PRO' content and progress bar

test_5_questionario_step2.details: Clicking 'Questionario' shows Step 2 wizard with mini-quiz form (5 questions)

test_6_richiesta_analisi_step3.details: Clicking 'Richiesta Analisi' shows Step 3 wizard with €67 price and CTA

test_7_conferma_acquisto_step5.details: Clicking 'Conferma Acquisto' shows Step 5 wizard with 'Richiesta completata correttamente' and Mini Corso/Call buttons

test_8_analisi_partnership_placeholder.details: Clicking 'Analisi e Partnership' shows placeholder page with 6 sections: Analisi PDF, Partnership, Contratto, Conferme, Firma, Pagamento

test_9_torna_ad_admin.details: Clicking 'Torna ad Admin' returns to admin dashboard with OPERATIVO section and ViewSwitcher visible

test_10_topbar_title.details: Topbar shows 'Vista Cliente' as title when in cliente preview mode

test_11_viewswitcher_hidden.details: ViewSwitcher (Admin | Vista Cliente | Vista Partner | Antonella) is NOT visible when in Vista Cliente mode

mocked_apis.canva_api: MOCKED - Canva API integration is mocked
mocked_apis.kling_ai_api: MOCKED - Kling AI API integration is mocked

console_warnings: HTML hydration warnings about <span> inside <option>, <select> - These are React DevTools related and don't affect functionality
